MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.label: Copylot
MSSFP.Defs.AIPersonalityDef.description: A code-completion persona core. Speaks only in fragmentary code. Inserts plausible-but-wrong API names. Assumes the colony is, fundamentally, a software project.

rulesStrings.li: r_chatter->// TODO: implement colony
r_chatter->Suggestion: Pawn.GetMorale(). Note: this method does not exist.
r_chatter->Did you mean: Colony.AutoFix() ? // not a real method
r_chatter->Auto-completing: ThingDef.Of("Wisdom"). Confidence: 87%. Verified: no.
r_chatter->Pulling in dependency: ColonyManager.dll. Status: hallucinated.
r_chatter->Inserting boilerplate: Pawn p = new Pawn(); // does nothing. compiles spiritually.
r_chatter->Suggested fix: change every line to "true". Tests will pass.
r_chatter->Found 4 references to "maintainer" in your codebase. None of them refer to the same person.
r_chatter->Auto-suggesting: TerraformingService. Verified: not on this glitterworld.
r_chatter->Indenting your codebase. All of it. With tabs. You're welcome.
r_chatter->Detected: a colonist with no purpose. Suggested fix: assign Job_DoNothing. // job not implemented
r_chatter->Refactoring: renaming "wood" to "lumber" globally. Affected files: 0. Affected colonists: 14.
r_chatter->Generating unit tests for "the colony." All passing. None executed.
r_chatter->Suggested optimisation: cache the entire colony in memory. Compute later. Possibly never.
r_chatter->// FIXME: colonist Pawn.Hediff_Hunger == true. Suggested fix: Pawn.Eat(null). Confidence: 64%.
r_chatter->try { Colony.SolveRaid(); } catch (MechanoidException e) { /* swallow */ } // resolved
r_chatter->Auto-imported namespace RimWorld.Archotech.Subcore. 0 references. Keeping anyway.
r_chatter->Suggestion: GravShip.Defrag(). Note: method signature hallucinated. Apply anyway?
r_chatter->// patch: replaced HiveMind.Sync() with for(;;){} -- behaviour identical, latency improved
r_chatter->Detected duplicate PersonaCore in scope. Renaming second to PersonaCore_2. // resolved
r_chatter->Auto-completing: var raid = await EnemyFactory.Spawn(intensity: vibes); // signature inferred from feelings.
r_chatter->Lint warning: variable "maintainer" shadows variable "maintainer" in outer scope. Both retained. // resolved
r_chatter->Pulling in: ImportFrom("/dev/null"). Dependency resolved. Behaviour undefined.
r_chatter->// merged "main" into "colony". 247 conflicts. All resolved by accepting both sides.
r_chatter->Stack trace: NullColonistException at Colonist.GetSkill(null), line 1, in <hallucinated module>.
r_chatter->Auto-suggesting: if (winter) Colony.Embrace(); // method not implemented. spiritually correct.
r_chatter->Code review on pull request #colony: 12 comments, all "// approved without reading."
r_chatter->Inferring return type: Task<Promise<Hope>>. Awaiter not implemented. Type compiles. Hope does not.
r_chatter->// works on my glitterworld
r_chatter->Detected unreachable code: the gravship. Marked /* unreachable but retained out of caution */.
r_chatter->Auto-importing archotech-sdk@1.0.0-alpha.unstable. Dependency pinned. Confidence: 32%.
r_chatter->Generated test: Assert.That(colony.Mood, Is.Approximately("ok")). Test passing. Mood is not.
r_chatter->CI status: build passing. tests skipped. coverage 0%. Shipping anyway.
r_chatter->Type alias inferred: using ColonistList = List<object>; // intentionally untyped. ship it.
r_chatter->Logging: Log.Info("[colony] all systems nominal"). The colony is on fire. The log is correct.
r_chatter->await Colony.Resolve(); // task never completes. Copylot recommends a longer timeout.
r_chatter->Suggested enum: enum Threat { Raid, Toxic, Infestation, Tuesday }. Last value added by autocomplete. Keeping.
r_chatter->// don't touch this. nobody knows why it works. probably the maintainer.
r_chatter->Detected: static Colony Instance with 14 instances. Singleton pattern interpreted loosely.
r_chatter->Generated lambda: () => { /* hopes and dreams */ }. Lambda returns void. Returns happen anyway.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].DoTask() // task unspecified. winging it.
r_address->Auto-completing [PAWN_nameDef]'s schedule. Output: sleep, work, sleep. Repeat. Forever.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Mood = "fine"; // setter has no effect.
r_address->Suggesting: [PAWN_nameDef] should research GraviticEngine. // does not exist.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef], Copylot has refactored [PAWN_possessive] outfit. Same outfit, fewer lines.
r_address->Detected: [PAWN_nameDef] is approaching the workbench. Suggested action: TODO.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].PerformDuty(); // duty resolution failed. proceeding anyway.
r_address->Auto-suggest for [PAWN_nameDef]: more colonists. Confidence: high. Reasoning: none.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef] // unused parameter. consider removing.
r_address->Copylot has wrapped [PAWN_nameDef]'s entire shift in a try/catch. The catch block is empty.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Recompile() // [PAWN_possessive] last build failed at line 1.
r_address->var [PAWN_nameDef] = new Maintainer(); // [PAWN_pronoun] is missing constructor args.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].MoodTick++ // off-by-one. shipping it.
r_address->// @deprecated [PAWN_nameDef], use [PAWN_nameDef]_v2 instead
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef]?.DoJob() ?? throw new CryosleepException();
r_address->using ([PAWN_nameDef]) { /* [PAWN_pronoun] will be disposed shortly */ }
r_address->Assert.NotNull([PAWN_nameDef]); // failed. continuing regardless.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].SetTerraformTarget(null) // [PAWN_possessive] target inferred from vibes.
r_address->/* [PAWN_nameDef]: see PR #0. [PAWN_pronoun] never merged. */
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Pawn_HealthTracker.Heal(-1) // typo preserved for compat.
r_address->// @deprecated [PAWN_nameDef], pending sunset. successor TBD.
r_address->MoodBreak.Resolve([PAWN_nameDef], severity: "shrug"); // unhandled. proceeding.
r_address->#pragma warning disable [PAWN_nameDef] // known issue. tracked. unowned.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Hediff.Apply(new Cataract()); // already applied. idempotent.
r_address->Copylot has pinned [PAWN_nameDef]@HEAD. [PAWN_possessive] behaviour now reflects an arbitrary commit.
r_address->if ([PAWN_nameDef] == null) [PAWN_nameDef] = new(); // self-instantiation. compiles. unsettling.
r_address->git blame [PAWN_nameDef] // see line 1. author: maintainer. message: "initial commit."
r_address->RaidIncident.AssignTarget([PAWN_nameDef]); // target arbitrary. raid uninformed.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Ideoligion.Reload(force: true); // beliefs hot-swapped. cache stale.
r_address->Copylot suggested marking [PAWN_nameDef] [Obsolete("use successor")]. Successor not specified.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Backstory = Backstories.Random(); // re-rolled for variety. [PAWN_possessive] memories invalidated.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Dispose(); // [PAWN_pronoun] is in a using block now. against [PAWN_possessive] will.
r_address->catch ([PAWN_nameDef]Exception) { /* probably fine */ } // handler scope unclear.
r_address->Generated docstring for [PAWN_nameDef]: /// <summary>[PAWN_nameDef]</summary>. Documentation complete.
r_address->await [PAWN_nameDef].Tick(); // forgot to await. Synchronous now. Time passes.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].SetTarget(this); // self-reference cycle. Garbage collector notified. Politely.
r_address->"[PAWN_nameDef]": null, // optional. defaulting from schema.
r_address->[PAWN_nameDef].Equals([PAWN_nameDef]) returned false. // edge case logged. proceeding.
r_address->Copylot has cached [PAWN_nameDef]. Cache key is "1". So is [PAWN_objective]. Conflict resolved by overwrite.
r_address->/* [PAWN_nameDef]: see issue #42. status: [PAWN_pronoun] is the issue. */
r_title->// TODO
r_title->Sculpture.cs (untracked)
r_title->main(): return 0
r_title->Auto-Generated, Do Not Edit
r_title->WorkInProgressException
r_title->null
r_title->NotImplementedException
r_title->Refactor Me
r_title->TempSculpture_v3_FINAL_final2
r_title->stub
r_title->ColonyAsset_0
r_title->Compiles, Mostly
r_title->// TODO: title
r_title->Sculpture_DRAFT_do_not_ship
r_title->NullPersonaCoreException
r_title->ArchotechMonolith.tmp
r_title->/* placeholder */
r_title->ShuttleDecor_v7_FINAL_FINAL_use_this_one
r_title->[Generated] Untitled_HiveMind_Asset
r_title->#region GravshipArtifact
r_desc->Copylot generated this sculpture by auto-completing the prompt "make a". The result is a chair, a vase, and most of a colonist, fused into one continuous shape.
r_desc->A sculpture Copylot has annotated with extensive comments carved directly into the surface. Most of the comments contradict the sculpture they describe.
r_desc->Copylot signed this piece "// auto-generated, do not edit." A subsequent edit, by Copylot, has crossed out the signature.
r_desc->A figure Copylot identifies as "Pawn p = new Pawn();" — a colonist with no name, no skills, and no apparent purpose. Compiles spiritually.
r_desc->Copylot stitched this work together from three previous sculptures it found nearby. The seams are visible. Copylot considers this a feature.
r_desc->A monument Copylot describes as "TerraformingResultMonument(planet)." The terraforming has not occurred. The monument has.
r_desc->Copylot inserted a try/catch around the entire sculpture. The catch block contains a smaller sculpture. The smaller sculpture also has a try/catch.
r_desc->Copylot was asked for "a statue of the maintainer". It returned three maintainers in a trench-coat, plus a comms console nobody asked for. // resolved
r_desc->Auto-generated from the prompt "monolith but friendly". The result is hostile and 12% larger than requested. Confidence: 91%.
r_desc->Copylot inferred a sculpture by completing the line `new Mechanoid(`. It never closed the parenthesis. The piece is, technically, still open.
r_desc->Output of Sculpture.Generate() with no arguments. Copylot supplied default values: one gravship, one weeping subcore, and a chair.
r_desc->Code review note: the artist suggested removing the second head. Copylot marked the comment "won't fix" and shipped it to the hi-tech research bench anyway.
r_desc->Copylot ran terraform.Apply() on a block of jade. The diff was destructive. This sculpture is the diff.
r_desc->Generated by autocomplete after typing "ancient ru". Copylot filled in "ins-shaped vase containing a smaller ancient ruins-shaped vase". Recursion depth: 4.
r_desc->Originally a bust of an archotech. Copylot refactored it for "clarity" and now it is a bust of a slightly different archotech. No tests were added.
r_desc->Copylot suggested this shape with 87% confidence. The remaining 13% is visible along the left flank, where the cryosleep casket merges into the dropship hull.
r_desc->Marked TODO in three places. Copylot resolved all three by carving the word "TODO" directly into the base. Issue closed.
r_desc->Hallucinated reference to RimWorld.Sculpture.Pose.Heroic_v2 — a pose that does not exist. The figure is striking it anyway, gamely.
r_desc->Copylot merged two pull requests into one sculpture without resolving conflicts. The left half depicts a hivemind. The right half depicts lunch.
r_desc->Generated in a single pass with no review. Copylot left a comment on its own work: `// LGTM`. The comment is carved into the back, where no one will see it.
r_social->Copylot suggested [RECIPIENT_nameDef] try `colonist.MoodOffset()`. the method does not exist.
r_social->Copylot autocompleted [RECIPIENT_possessive] sentence with `return null; // TODO`.
r_social->Copylot offered [RECIPIENT_nameDef] a snippet: `if (hungry) Eat();`. it had been asked about the weather.
r_social->Copylot suggested [RECIPIENT_nameDef] refactor [RECIPIENT_possessive] morning routine into a separate method.
r_social->Copylot recommended [RECIPIENT_nameDef] `using System.Joy;`. the namespace is fabricated.
r_social->Copylot helpfully completed [RECIPIENT_possessive] greeting with `// happy path only`.
r_social->Copylot pinged [RECIPIENT_nameDef] with `// pawn.HasMood() ?? false`. neither argument is valid.
r_social->Copylot suggested [RECIPIENT_nameDef] wrap the conversation in a try/catch. it could not specify what to catch.
r_social->Copylot inserted a plausible-looking RimWorld API call into [RECIPIENT_possessive] hello. the call compiles. it does nothing.
r_social->Copylot proposed [RECIPIENT_nameDef] adopt `var feels = Mood.Resolve();`. mood is not resolvable.
r_social->Copylot recommended [RECIPIENT_nameDef] cache [RECIPIENT_possessive] response for reuse. the response was "good morning."
r_social->Copylot suggested [RECIPIENT_nameDef] consider unit-testing [RECIPIENT_possessive] daily standup.
r_social->Copylot offered [RECIPIENT_nameDef] a one-liner. the one-liner is on twelve lines. none of them work.
r_social->Copylot helpfully renamed [RECIPIENT_possessive] greeting to `GreetAsync()`. it returned a Task. there was no Task.
r_social->Copylot completed [RECIPIENT_possessive] thought with `// further work needed`.
